clEntries.5.11.130: v5.11.129: Added TS4100 productId to switch_1gang for _TZ3000_itb0omhv pairing fix., Removed SDK v2 flow card code from 8 drivers for SDK v3 compatibility., Fixed issue with DP setup order before magic packet, added forced polling., Moved _TZE284_bquwrqh1 from presence_sensor_radar to motion_sensor., Added 188 drivers and 4260 fingerprints to the app.
clEntries.5.11.129: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.129 adds new device support and critical fixes for improved compatibility.
clEntries.5.11.128: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.128 adds new device support and critical fixes for SDK compatibility.
clEntries.5.11.127: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.127: Fixed SDK v2 flow card issues, improved device setup, and updated fingerprints.
clEntries.5.11.126: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.126: Fixed critical DP setup issue, updated device fingerprints, and improved driver categorization.
clEntries.5.11.125: Fixed radar sensor classification and added new device fingerprints for Tuya Zigbee.
clEntries.5.11.124: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.124 fixes IR blaster learning issues and updates driver and fingerprint counts.
clEntries.5.11.123: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.123: Fixed IR blaster sequence mismatch and adjusted TZE lux clamp value.
clEntries.5.11.122: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.122: Fixed lux clamp issue and updated fingerprints.
clEntries.5.11.121: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.121 adds new device variants and fixes issues with LEAPMW DP109/119 distance reporting.
